title: Campus Parking Fee Increase
description: A university is considering higher parking fees to fund transit subsidies.

participants.name: Alex
participants.statement: Higher parking fees can fund better bus passes and reduce traffic.

participants.name: Morgan
participants.statement: Commuter students already pay too much and need affordable parking.

participants.name: Jules
participants.statement: Transit subsidies help students who cannot afford cars.

participants.name: Riley
participants.statement: Night students need safe and reliable ways to get home.

participants.name: Taylor
participants.statement: The campus never listens to commuters before raising fees.

participants.name: Casey
participants.statement: A lower-income exemption could make the policy fairer.
